# Serial Bankruptcy Filer -- Risks & Consequences [2026]
> What happens to serial bankruptcy filers? Reduced automatic stay, dismissal risk, and bad faith presumptions. 2026 guide.

## About
serialfiler.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Filing Again After Chapter 13: https://serialfiler.org/after-chapter-13.html
- Filing Again After Chapter 7: https://serialfiler.org/after-chapter-7.html
- Serial Filer Automatic Stay -- Only 30 Days Under 362(c)(3): https://serialfiler.org/automatic-stay-limits.html
- When Can I File Bankruptcy Again? Date Calculator: https://serialfiler.org/calculator.html
- How Many People File Bankruptcy Twice -- Repeat Filing Statistics: https://serialfiler.org/data.html
- Dismissed vs Discharged: Can I Refile After a Bankruptcy Dismissal?: https://serialfiler.org/dismissed-vs-discharged.html
- Serial Bankruptcy Filer -- Risks & Consequences: https://serialfiler.org/
- Third Bankruptcy Filing -- No Automatic Stay at All Under 362(c)(4): https://serialfiler.org/no-stay-at-all.html
- When Does Refiling Bankruptcy Make Sense?: https://serialfiler.org/strategic-refiling.html
- Bankruptcy Waiting Periods: Every Chapter Combination: https://serialfiler.org/waiting-periods.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
